menu:
categoryId="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.presentation.sql"
<dataSourcePage
highlightPreferenceKey="occurrenceHighlighting" id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.sql.script"
%colorDefinition.org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.table.foreground.description
showInNextPrevDropdownToolbarAction="true"
categoryId="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.presentation.sql"
value="COLOR_WIDGET_BACKGROUND"> isGoToPreviousNavigationTargetKey="isOccurrenceGoToPreviousNavigationTarget"
overviewRulerPreferenceValue="true"
<editor name="%editor.sql.name"
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.number.foreground"
<colorDefinition
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.parameter.foreground"
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.schema.foreground"
label="SQL Workbench/J formatter"
name="%column.org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.columns.script.position.name">
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.function.foreground"
label="%colorDefinition.org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.semanticError.foreground.label" <specification
<context
<specification
textStylePreferenceKey="occurrenceTextStyle"
colorPreferenceKey="writeOccurrenceIndicationColor"
%colorDefinition.org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.aiSuggestion.foreground.description
description="%page.org.jkiss.dbeaver.preferences.main.sqlexecute.description"/> label="%colorDefinition.org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.aiSuggestion.foreground.label" value="COLOR_DARK_GRAY">
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.sql.SQLEditorPropertyTester"
id="presentationId"
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.sql.generator.SQLGeneratorPropertyTester"
presentationLayer="4"
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.sql.SQLResultsEditor"
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.sql.preferences.PrefPageSQLFormat"
<colorDefinition <colorDefinition presentationLayer="4"
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.keyword.foreground" categoryId="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.presentation.sql"
namespace="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.sql"
%colorDefinition.org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.datatype.foreground.description textPreferenceKey="writeOccurrenceIndication"
values="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.sql.handlers.SQLEditorHandlerSwitchPresentation$ParameterValues"/>
value="COLOR_DARK_GREEN">
description="Formatter from SQL Workbench/J"/>
global="false"
textStylePreferenceValue="NONE"> label="%colorDefinition.org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.datatype.foreground.label" class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.sql.convert.impl.HTMLSQLConverter"/>
highlightPreferenceValue="true"
textPreferenceValue="false"
label="%colorDefinition.org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.aiSuggestion.background.label"
categoryId="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.presentation.sql" class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.sql.preferences.PrefPageSQLCodeEditing"
<colorDefinition
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.composite.field.foreground"
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.disabled.background"
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.sql.convert.impl.UnformattedSQLConverter"/>

verticalRulerPreferenceKey="occurrenceIndicationInVerticalRuler"
<colorDefinition

<colorDefinition
mode="FORCE_TEXT"
id="sql-editor.format"
isGoToNextNavigationTarget="false" label="%colorDefinition.org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.keyword.foreground.label"
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.column.derived.foreground"
extensions="sql"
enabled="false"
label="%colorDefinition.org.jkiss.dbeaver.sql.editor.color.command.foreground.label" description="%sql.convert.unformatted.text.description"
